_comment: s&box Dedicated Server egg. SteamCMD app id 1892930. Sourced from sbox.game/dev/doc/networking/dedicated-servers (April 2026).
name: s&box Dedicated Server
author: ops@local
description: Facepunch s&box dedicated server (Wine runtime). Image bakes a Wine prefix + Windows .NET; entrypoint runs sbox-server.exe via wine. App 1892930 via SteamCMD. See https://sbox.game/dev/doc/networking/dedicated-servers/

installation.script:
#!/bin/sh
# Image entrypoint seeds the prebaked Wine prefix + s&box files into /home/container on first boot,
# and runs SteamCMD on every boot when SBOX_AUTO_UPDATE=1, so this install step is intentionally minimal.
mkdir -p /mnt/server/projects /mnt/server/logs /mnt/server/sbox
echo 'Install complete; runtime image will seed files on first boot.'

variables.name: Steam App ID
variables.description: SteamCMD app id for the s&box dedicated server. Default 1892930.

variables.name: Branch
variables.description: Optional Steam beta branch (e.g. 'staging'). Blank = stable.

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: 1 = run SteamCMD on every container boot. 0 = boot from existing files.

variables.name: Server Name
variables.description: Hostname shown in the server browser. Avoid bare ampersands (&) — Pterodactyl HTML-escapes them. Use 'and' or quote them.

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: Maximum players. Leave blank to use the gamemode default. Some gamemodes ignore this.

variables.name: Local Project (.sbproj)
variables.description: Optional. Relative path under /home/container/projects/ to a .sbproj file (e.g. mygame/mygame.sbproj). Overrides the Game Package field when set and the file exists.

variables.name: Game Server Token
variables.description: Optional Steam game server login token (+net_game_server_token). Generate at https://steamcommunity.com/dev/managegameservers. Lets the server keep the same Steam ID across restarts.

variables.name: Direct Connect
variables.description: 1 = expose IP/port for direct connection (sets +net_hide_address 0). 0 = Steam relay only. Experimental.

variables.name: Game Package
variables.description: Game package ident to load (e.g. facepunch.sandbox). Ignored when Local Project is set.

variables.name: Map Package
variables.description: Optional map package ident (e.g. facepunch.flatgrass). Leave blank to let the game pick.

variables.name: Query Port
variables.description: UDP port used for server browser queries (+net_query_port).

variables.name: Extra Startup Args
variables.description: Appended verbatim to the sbox-server.exe command line.
